overall.description: A first-person exploration sequence through a foggy, neon-lit cyberpunk urban environment at night. The player character walks through narrow industrial alleys and overgrown paths toward a massive circular holographic billboard structure, with wet ground reflecting the artificial lighting. The footage exhibits high-fidelity game engine rendering characteristic of Cyberpunk 2077.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through a narrow alleyway between industrial structures, passing under fluorescent tube lighting

entered.detail: two-story concrete building with metal railings and warm fluorescent tube lighting
single-story garage with green roll-up door and flat roof
elevated wooden walkway with metal support columns running along the building
metal wire fence running along the right side of the alley

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a narrow enclosed alley between industrial buildings at night. The camera moves forward along a dirt path, passing under the fluorescent lights of a covered walkway on the left. A garage structure is visible on the right, and the atmosphere is foggy with artificial lighting providing the only illumination.

scene_state.functional_zone: corner of industrial building approaching commercial plaza

events.description: turning left around building corner, revealing large circular billboard structure in the distance
american flag on building becomes visible, illuminated by warm spotlight

agents.ego_description: turning the corner of the industrial building and proceeding toward a massive illuminated structure visible through the fog

entered.detail: large United States flag hanging vertically from building facade, illuminated by warm light
massive cylindrical digital billboard displaying colorful animated advertisements, towering over the foggy skyline
silver metal safety railing along the edge of the elevated path
tall palm trees silhouetted against the foggy night sky

segments.scene_description: The camera turns left around the building corner, transitioning from the enclosed alley to a more open area. An American flag becomes visible on the building facade, and in the distance, a massive circular holographic billboard emerges through the fog. Palm trees are visible in the background as the path continues toward the commercial district.

scene_state.functional_zone: overgrown path leading toward commercial district

events.description: camera passes through dense vegetation, temporarily obscuring the view of the path ahead
ground becomes more uneven with scattered trash and debris visible

agents.ego_description: navigating through overgrown vegetation along a narrow dirt path, approaching the illuminated billboard structure

entered.detail: dense bushes and tall grass lining both sides of the narrow path
wooden electrical poles with transformers and hanging wires

segments.scene_description: The path narrows and becomes overgrown with vegetation encroaching from the sides. The massive circular billboard grows larger in the center of the frame as the camera advances. The ground is uneven dirt with scattered debris, and utility poles line the right side of the path.

scene_state.functional_zone: open plaza beneath massive circular advertising structure

events.description: emerging from narrow path into wide open plaza area beneath the circular billboard structure
intense neon light from overhead billboard illuminates the scene with blue and orange hues reflecting off wet ground

agents.ego_description: moving through the open plaza area, observing the massive overhead structure and distant city lights through the fog

entered.detail: heaps of garbage bags and discarded items scattered across the ground
derelict dark-colored car parked near the building edge
glowing commercial signs and building lights visible through the fog in the distance
raised roadway structure with streetlights running parallel to the plaza

segments.scene_description: The camera emerges from the narrow path into a wide open plaza beneath the massive circular billboard, which now dominates the left side of the frame. The ground is littered with trash piles and an abandoned vehicle sits to the left. Intense neon light from the overhead structure reflects off the wet ground, while distant city lights and an elevated highway are visible through the fog.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a claustrophobic industrial alleyway into a vast, neon-drenched urban plaza. It begins by moving forward along a dirt path between enclosed buildings, passing under the fluorescent glow of a covered walkway amidst a thick fog. As the camera turns a corner past an American flag, the space opens up to reveal palm trees and the distant silhouette of a massive circular holographic billboard emerging through the haze. The scene then shifts into a narrowing, overgrown corridor lined with utility poles and debris, where the billboard grows increasingly dominant in the frame. Finally, the camera emerges from the vegetation into a wide open plaza, where intense neon light reflects off wet ground and trash-strewn pavement beneath the towering holographic structure and a distant elevated highway.
